title: more create mixing recipes
description: this datapack adds some useful mixing recipes
body:
THis datapack will ad some **useful mixing recipes** that will help you play the create mod or               **automate more useful stuff** . you should downlaod it if you want to automate some useful          stuf .   I hope you like this **datapck/mod** , it is my first datapack ever . **_PLS download  this datapack_**.                                                                                            
|                                                                                                 
|                                                                                                          
**Have recipe ideas?                                                                                   
Send them in the GitHub Issues section                                                                                                                                   
I would really need ideas**                                                                                            
|                ----> https://github.com/ParroteX2/create-recipe/issues/1 <----                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                
 **_You can also create recipes and send it to me on Github and I code them for you _** it wont take long
